Off Calendar Mar-28-2005 Continued To May-31-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for Defendant and Cross-Complainant's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that Cross-Complaint is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Court ordered an OSC to Plaintiff's counsel set on 5/31/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior, CSR# 9129. (212)
